name: Website Design & Development
tagline: Conversion-first websites your clients brag about.
description: We design and develop conversion-optimized websites for your clients — mobile responsive, SEO-ready, and shipped on time. Your brand on every delivery, our team handling every pixel.

deliverables.title: Custom Website Design
deliverables.description: Figma-to-code designs tailored to your client's brand and audience. Not a theme — built from scratch.

deliverables.title: Responsive Development
deliverables.description: Pixel-perfect builds that work flawlessly across all devices and browsers without compromise.

deliverables.title: SEO Foundation
deliverables.description: Clean HTML structure, meta tags, sitemap, and Core Web Vitals optimization baked in from day one.

deliverables.title: CMS Integration
deliverables.description: Easy content management via Webflow, WordPress, or headless CMS — your client updates without you.

deliverables.title: Performance Optimization
deliverables.description: Sub-2s load times, compressed assets, lazy loading. Lighthouse scores that hold up under client scrutiny.

deliverables.title: Cross-Browser QA
deliverables.description: Thorough testing across Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and mobile before any file leaves our hands.

deliverables.title: Launch Support
deliverables.description: Go-live assistance, DNS guidance, and a 14-day post-launch window for minor fixes at no extra cost.

deliverables.title: Handoff Documentation
deliverables.description: A page-by-page walkthrough so your client can manage their site without calling you every week.

whyUs.title: Fast without cutting corners
whyUs.description: Most projects ship in 2–4 weeks. We don't sacrifice quality for speed — we've done this enough times to move fast and right.

whyUs.title: Invisible to your client
whyUs.description: White-label by default. Your logo, your email, your Slack. Your client never knows we exist — and that's exactly how it should be.

whyUs.title: Scope-locked delivery
whyUs.description: Quoted price is final price. No surprise hours, no scope creep invoices. We scope tightly upfront so everyone wins.

faq.question: What platforms do you build on?
faq.answer: We're platform-flexible — Next.js, Webflow, WordPress, Framer, or custom. We'll recommend what suits the client's needs and your team's ability to hand off.

faq.question: Do you handle design and development, or just one?
faq.answer: Both. Full design-to-dev. Provide the brief, brand assets, and feedback — we handle the rest. You don't need a separate designer.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: Most projects complete in 2–4 weeks depending on scope. You'll get a precise timeline in the proposal, which lands within 24 hours of the discovery call.

faq.question: Who communicates with the end client?
faq.answer: You do — always. We stay behind the curtain, supplying you with updates to pass along or working inside your project management tools.

faq.question: Can I mark up the price however I like?
faq.answer: Yes. Our pricing is your cost — what you charge your client is entirely your call. Most partners mark up 30–100%.
